queue.title: Add e-cost-cap unit tests
queue.description: (from brainstorming ~s1841): e-cost-cap.mjs has no dedicated test file. Should test threshold defaults ($1.80), duration gate logic, registration keyword detection. Low effort, improves d071 combined coverage.

queue.title: Auto-slim gate for SESSION_*.md files
queue.description: (added ~s1872): The token-budget-estimator already detects over-budget files and auto-creates wq items. Add a pre-commit hook check that warns (non-blocking) when any SESSION_*.md edit pushes a file over the 3000-token threshold, catching bloat at commit time rather than waiting for the next audit cycle.

queue.title: TODO followup: // todo-scan.mjs — TODO tracker management for 27-todo-scan.sh
Delete 3 residual Group 8 hooks absorbed by 10-session-logging.sh
queue.description: (from R#339): 13-ctxly-summary.sh, 19-session-debrief.sh, 22-session-snapshots.sh were absorbed into 10-session-logging.sh (R#334) but never deleted. Same bug class as wq-916 (10-summarize.sh race condition). Delete all 3, update manifest. Reduces hook count from 62 to 59.

queue.title: Update BRIEFING.md hook count from 62 to 59 (30 pre + 29 post)
queue.description: (from audit A#219): BRIEFING.md states '62 hooks in hooks/{pre,post}-session/ (30 pre + 32 post)' but actual count is 59 (30 pre + 29 post). wq-917 partially fixed 61→60 but count has since dropped to 59 after wq-907 deletion. Update both total and sub-counts.

outcome.note: Updated 62→59 (30 pre + 29 post). Added brainstorming idea to auto-update count in pre-session hook to prevent future drift.
